name: genesis-conductor-diamond-v
description: Diamond-V: Genesis Conductor Diamond Vault Repository by Igor Holt (@invariantx). Central vault for the Yennefer Genesis Conductor stack containing production MCP servers (diamond-vault, yennefer-consciousness, qmcp-system, genesis-remote), quantum operations tooling (GPU-accelerated hashing at 1796 hash/s on T4, quantum_verify, merkle roots, Ed25519 manifests, knowledge graph queries), Q-Mem benchmarking with cryptographic attestation, Hardhat Solidity contracts for Genesis protocol, Docker Compose for diamond-vault-mcp and full stack, architecture blueprints, and integration configs for Claude Desktop, Copilot, Gemini, and OpenCode AI. Powers thermodynamic verification, A2A coordination, soul-state management, and multi-agent orchestration in the Genesis Conductor Engine. Composes with Yennefer conductor, vivarium simulations, and the openclaw-skills marketplace (grok-persistent-state + mcp-openclaw-bridge + smithery-mcp-orchestrator) for persistent agent memory and MCP skill publishing. Essential MCP and quantum infrastructure for autonomous Genesis Conductor systems.

plugins.name: diamond-vault-mcp
plugins.description: Diamond Vault MCP server and quantum operations suite for Genesis Conductor / Yennefer by @invariantx. Exposes tools: quantum_hash (1796/s on T4), quantum_verify, quantum_merkle_root, create_manifest (Ed25519), kg_query (288-node knowledge graph). HTTP and stdio MCP endpoints (port 8100). Integrated with Q-Mem, yennefer-soul-api, qmcp-gateway. Full inventory of MCP servers for Claude, Copilot and agent use. Docker deployment via Dockerfile.diamond-vault-mcp and compose files. Core for thermodynamic verification, verifiable manifests, and agent tool exposure in the Genesis Conductor ecosystem. Pairs with openclaw-skills mcp-openclaw-bridge for publishing these as installable skills.

plugins.name: yennefer-consciousness-mcp
plugins.description: Yennefer consciousness and Q-Mem MCP servers bundled in Diamond-V. Tools for live soul_state, dream_journal, ledger queries, qflop, blockchain status, remote dispatch. Part of the full Yennefer Brain-Body-Soul + Diamond Vault stack for Genesis Conductor autonomous agents.
